name: fuzzy-search
description: MCP server exposing fuzzy content/file/document search tools built on ripgrep + fzf (plus ripgrep-all and PyMuPDF for PDFs). Use when searching code, files, or documents with fuzzy filtering, or extracting/inspecting PDF pages and outlines.

interface.longDescription: MCP server exposing fuzzy content/file/document search tools built on ripgrep + fzf (plus ripgrep-all and PyMuPDF for PDFs). Use when searching code, files, or documents with fuzzy filtering, or extracting/inspecting PDF pages and outlines.
defaultPrompt: Use the fuzzy-search MCP tools for this task.
